## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring Manager Screen for Technical Managing Editor role at growthx.ai](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Role involves client management, content quality assessment, and pipeline optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Ideal candidate has experience with content management, AI tools, and workflow processes](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)
  - [Position requires quick learning, problem-solving, and ability to articulate technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Company culture emphasizes documentation, autonomy, and continuous improvement](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Responsibilities

  - [Chief Content Officer focuses on internal quality and pipeline optimization](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Technical Managing Editor (ME) duties:](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
      - [Client-facing: manage expectations, reporting, strategy discussions](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
      - [Content quality assessment: evaluate pipeline outputs](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
      - [Process improvement: identify and articulate pipeline issues](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
  - [MEs typically manage 2-4 Content Managers (CMs), overseeing 2-6 clients](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1158.0)
  - [Weekly client meetings (30 min) and regular CM check-ins required](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)

### Company Culture and Work Environment

  - [Remote work with documentation-heavy processes](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Emphasis on self-learning and problem-solving](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Nascent industry with evolving standards and practices](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)
  - [Trust-building between managers and team members crucial](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1543.0)
  - [Action-biased approach with minimal unnecessary meetings](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

### Technical Aspects of the Role

  - [Company uses proprietary platform (Atlas) for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=374.0)
  - [Involves understanding and optimizing AI pipelines and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1012.0)
  - [Experience with LLM tools and ad-hoc AI workflows valuable](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Ability to prototype solutions and communicate with engineering team](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1401.0)

### Hiring Context and Expectations

  - [Hiring driven by capacity needs due to rapid growth](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [New hires expected to quickly learn documentation and pipeline processes](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Taking on steady-state clients within 2-3 weeks of joining](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Need for authoritative client management and high-quality content delivery](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Candidate to consider fit with technical aspects of the role](https://fathom.video/share/zQC9fmq9BUArb6APYJRq748CfnRJ73yx?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
